tasks.label: KKSS: Build Package
tasks.detail: Builds submodules + app, then packages installers into release/ via electron-builder

tasks.label: KKSS: Install Locally (Windows)
args: $exe = Get-ChildItem -Path release -Filter 'KKSS-*-win-*.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $exe) { throw 'No Windows installer found in release/ - run the KKSS: Build Package task first.' }; Start-Process -FilePath $exe.FullName -Wait
tasks.detail: Runs the latest NSIS installer from release/ to install KKSS locally

tasks.label: KKSS: Build & Install (Windows)
tasks.detail: Build the installer package and launch it to install KKSS locally for testing/debugging
